class Rethrow {
    void wrap() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException("wrap", e);
        }
    }

    // Bare rethrow propagates, so minimal JV001 is clean here. The no-op-wrapper
    // case (JV004) and cause-less chain (JV002) arrive in F8c.
    void bare() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw e;
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
